summary: Gastromek CRM Accounting (Buchhaltung/Muhasebe) module verified end-to-end. Backend pytest: 42/42 PASS (added 16 new accounting tests covering CRUD, validation, EUR amounts, date-range filter, search-by-description, cats filter, pagination, stats totals & monthly, RBAC for sales/muhasebe/admin, settings persistence of accounting_visible_roles). Frontend Playwright: all critical flows pass. Verified: (1) Admin login OK, sidebar shows 'Buchhaltung' (DE). (2) /muhasebe loads with all data-testids: sum-income, sum-expense, sum-net, accounting-chart, accounting-kind-filter, accounting-search, accounting-date-from/to, income-column, expense-column. (3) New income flow: tx-description-block is HIDDEN before tx-category-select then APPEARS after selecting a category — entry appears in income-column with correct EUR amount (€2.500,75 for 2500.75). (4) New expense flow: created Miete entry €1.234,56 appears in expense-column. (5) Kind filter switches columns: 'Nur Einnahmen' hides expense-column, 'Nur Ausgaben' hides income-column, 'Alle' shows both. (6) Search by category NAME (typed 'Miete' DE -> frontend resolves to cats=kira) finds the expense row; search by description token ('Bueromiete') also finds it. (7) Date range 2030-01-01..2030-12-31 restricts totals to €0,00. (8) Edit (edit-tx-<id>) opens sheet, changed amount 9.999,99 persisted in expense-column. (9) DE<->TR toggle: TR mode renders Muhasebe/Gelir/Gider/Kategori/Tümü/Diğer/Ulaşım with NO raw i18n keys (regex /\baccounting\.[a-zA-Z_]+/ returned 0 leaks on both /muhasebe and other pages). (10) Settings: tab-access present, access-sales-switch + access-muhasebe-switch both present and visible. (11) Dashboard finance-panel (dashboard-finance-panel) visible for admin. (12) Backend RBAC pytest verified: muhasebe role accepted by /api/users, muhasebe & sales can GET /api/accounting by default, after admin removes 'sales' from accounting_visible_roles the sales session gets 403 on /api/accounting while admin & muhasebe remain 200; setting persists across GET. (13) Backend validation: POST with kind='foo' -> 400, POST with kind='income'+category='kira' (kira is expense) -> 400. All amounts stored as currency=EUR. Stats endpoint returns total_income/total_expense/net/monthly[] correctly with date_from/date_to filters.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/accounting.py: _build_filter uses $or for search OR cats - works correctly because frontend (Muhasebe.jsx matchingCats useMemo) resolves typed DE/TR category names to category CODES and sends them as 'cats' param. Backend regex on description uses re.escape (safe) and case-insensitive.

POST/PUT validators strictly enforce kind in (income,expense) and category in INCOME_CATEGORIES or EXPENSE_CATEGORIES respectively. Currency is always set to 'EUR' server-side regardless of payload — good.
ensure_access: admin always allowed; otherwise checks accounting_visible_roles from settings (default [admin,sales,muhasebe]). Returns 403 on disallowed — matches expected behavior.

Muhasebe.jsx gates the page itself by fetching /settings on mount and navigating to '/' if canAccess returns false. Sidebar.jsx hides the link based on the same setting. Dashboard.jsx gates the finance BarChart panel. All three gates use the same canAccess logic — consistent.

Muhasebe.jsx: description field rendered conditionally on form.category (line 296) — matches spec 'only appears AFTER a category is selected and is optional'. Description is sent and trimmed server-side.

Minor: GET /api/accounting/stats uses search via $or with description regex AND cats $in (when provided). For a typed search like 'Miete' frontend sends both search='Miete' and cats='kira', so stats also include cat=kira rows — matches behavior of list endpoint. Consistent.
Pagination param page_size validated (ge=1, le=200); frontend uses 8 per column. TxColumn correctly computes totalPages from data.total.
i18n translations.js contains complete accounting.* keys for de and tr (incomeTypes, expenseTypes, filters, labels). Verified no raw 'accounting.xxx' key leaks in either language.
test_credentials: admin@arigastro.com / admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test users created/deleted dynamically by pytest fixtures and Playwright cleanup.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create+delete entries per test (cleanup in try/finally). Playwright created 2 entries (TEST playwright income desc, TEST pw Bueromiete) which may remain — they are clearly TEST_-prefixed and visible in expense/income columns; can be deleted via DELETE /api/accounting/{id} or left as harmless test data. The pre-seeded entries from main agent (proje 1500.50 on 2026-06-01 and kira 800 on 2026-06-03) are untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (42 tests). Accounting fixtures: muhasebe_user, muhasebe_session, plus existing admin_session/sales_session. RBAC test toggles settings.accounting_visible_roles and restores it in finally. UI lang switcher is a custom dropdown (not radix Select) — trigger is button with text 'Deutsch'/'Türkçe' in sidebar bottom, items appear as 'Almanca'/'Deutsch'/'Türkçe'/'Türkisch'. Some leftover TEST_ prefixed accounting entries may exist; clean via /api/accounting search=TEST then DELETE.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The Accounting module is correctly implemented end-to-end: backend validation, EUR amounts, RBAC via settings, filters/search/pagination/stats, DE/TR i18n, role-based visibility for sidebar+dashboard+page+API. All 16 new pytest cases and all UI flows defined in the review request pass.
